prompt: avaliar profundidade do slide s-rs-vs-ma na aula metanalise

assertions.text: Report demonstrates that slide HTML (04-rs-vs-ma.html) was actually read and its content analyzed
Report includes depth rubric with 8 dimensions (D1-D8) and numeric scores
Report includes GRADE certainty assessment for at least 1 claim (High/Moderate/Low/Very Low)
Report cross-references evidence-db.md against slide HTML (consistency check)
Report contains findings from at least 3 search legs
Report suggests specific improvements for the slide content
Report includes comparative table or synthesis across search legs
